/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libqe_fftx.a CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_scatter.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_scatter_2d.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/scatter_mod.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_ggen.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_fwinv.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_scalar.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fftw_interfaces.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_parallel.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_parallel_2d.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_interfaces.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_interpolate.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/stick_base.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_smallbox.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_smallbox_type.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_support.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_error.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_types.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/tg_gather.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_helper_subroutines.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_param.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_scalar.cuFFT.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_buffers.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_scatter_gpu.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_scatter_2d_gpu.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_fftx.dir/fft_scalar.DFTI.f90.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libqe_fftx.a
